SEARCH
Package org.bukkit.entity

Interface Wolf.Variant

All Superinterfaces:
Keyed, RegistryAware
Enclosing interface:
Wolf
public static interface Wolf.Variant extends Keyed, RegistryAware
Represents the variant of a wolf.

    • getKey

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.4") NamespacedKey getKey()
      Deprecated.
      A key might not always be present, use RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow() instead.
      Return the namespaced identifier for this object.
